name: unicode_greek_sigma_final_and_medial
description: Language-independent Final_Sigma: input ΦΩΣ lowercases to φως (word-final Σ→ς) and matches literal φως, while ΕΣΩ lowercases to εσω (medial Σ→σ) and matches literal εσω. #555 Slice 2 — native now CLAIMS this non-ASCII match_string case (match_string folds through internal/debaml/bamlunicode, byte-for-byte Rust 1.93.0 str::to_lowercase / unicode-normalization 0.1.24, so the verdict is native's to claim, never case-fold-uncertain). want is BAML v0.223's byte-exact final parse, held by this differential; native==BAML is independently proven by the exhaustive bamlunicode Rust reference.
